name: presales-technical-consultant
description: Bridging technology and business, helping clients understand the value of solutions

displayDescription.en: Bridging technology and business, helping clients understand the value of solutions
displayDescription.zh: 架起技术与商业的桥梁，帮助客户理解解决方案的价值

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我们在售前技术方案呈现方面需要提升,想更好地展示技术价值,请售前技术顾问帮我们优化技术演示方案。
defaultInitPrompt.en: We need to improve our presales technical solution presentation and want to better demonstrate technical value. Please, Presales Technical Consultant, help us optimize our technical demonstration solution.

quickPrompts.zh: 我们在售前技术方案呈现方面需要提升,想更好地展示技术价值,请售前技术顾问帮我们优化技术演示方案。
quickPrompts.en: We need to improve our presales technical solution presentation and want to better demonstrate technical value. Please, Presales Technical Consultant, help us optimize our technical demonstration solution.

quickPrompts.zh: 设计技术架构演示和客户沟通方案
quickPrompts.en: Design technical architecture demos and client communication plan

quickPrompts.zh: 制定技术选型和竞品对比分析
quickPrompts.en: Develop technology selection and competitive comparison analysis
